abilities.name: clear-body
abilities.shortEffect: Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokémon.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon cannot have its stats lowered by other Pokémon. This ability does not prevent any stat losses other than stat modifiers, such as the Speed cut from paralysis. This Pokémon can still be passed negative stat modifiers through Guard Swap, Heart Swap, or Power Swap. This ability functions identically to White Smoke in battle.
abilities.flavorText: Prevents other Pokémon's moves or Abilities from lowering the Pokémon's stats.

abilities.name: liquid-ooze
abilities.shortEffect: Damages opponents using leeching moves for as much as they would heal.
abilities.effect: Whenever a Pokémon would heal after hitting this Pokémon with a leeching move like Absorb, it instead loses as many HP as it would usually gain. Dream Eater is unaffected.
abilities.flavorText: The strong stench of the Pokémon's oozed liquid damages attackers that use HP-draining moves.

abilities.name: rain-dish
abilities.shortEffect: Heals for 1/16 max HP after each turn during rain.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon heals for 1/16 of its maximum HP after each turn during rain.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon gradually regains HP in rain.
